Release notes

</form>

expansion-panel.title: FAQ accordion with single-open behavior
expansion-panel.code:
How do I reset my password?

Open Settings, choose Security, then select Reset password. A link will be sent to your email.

 Can I change my plan later?

Yes. Plans can be upgraded or downgraded at any time from the Billing page.

 Where can I download invoices?

All invoices are available under Billing, in the Invoice history section.

expansion-panel.title: Settings panel with custom header and actions
expansion-panel.code:
Notification preferences

Choose how and when we contact you about account activity and product updates.

Cancel Save

expansion-panel.title: Multi-open accordion with horizontal toggle
expansion-panel.code:
Shipping

Standard delivery arrives in 3 to 5 business days.

 Returns

Items can be returned within 30 days of receipt.

fab-menu.title: Primary FAB revealing a secondary action menu
fab-menu.code:
<m3e-button variant="filled" size="large">
  <m3e-fab-menu-trigger for="compose-menu"></m3e-fab-menu-trigger>
  <m3e-icon slot="icon" name="edit"></m3e-icon>
  Compose
</m3e-button>
<m3e-fab-menu id="compose-menu" variant="secondary">
  <m3e-menu-item>
    <m3e-icon slot="icon" name="mail"></m3e-icon>
    New email
  </m3e-menu-item>
  <m3e-menu-item>
    <m3e-icon slot="icon" name="event"></m3e-icon>
    New event
  </m3e-menu-item>
  <m3e-menu-item>

    New group
  </m3e-menu-item>
</m3e-fab-menu>

fab-menu.title: Tertiary FAB menu with link and disabled items
fab-menu.code:
<m3e-button variant="tonal" size="large">
  <m3e-fab-menu-trigger for="share-menu"></m3e-fab-menu-trigger>
  <m3e-icon slot="icon" name="share"></m3e-icon>
</m3e-button>
<m3e-fab-menu id="share-menu" variant="tertiary">
  <m3e-menu-item href="https://example.com/link" target="_blank">
    <m3e-icon slot="icon" name="link"></m3e-icon>
    Copy link
  </m3e-menu-item>
  <m3e-menu-item>
    <m3e-icon slot="icon" name="download"></m3e-icon>
    Export PDF
  </m3e-menu-item>
  <m3e-menu-item disabled>
    <m3e-icon slot="icon" name="print"></m3e-icon>
    Print
  </m3e-menu-item>
</m3e-fab-menu>

    Settings
  </m3e-nav-item>
</m3e-nav-rail>

<label for="comment">Add a comment</label>
<textarea id="comment" placeholder="Share your thoughts..."></textarea>
<m3e-textarea-autosize for="comment" min-rows="2" max-rows="8"></m3e-textarea-autosize>

textarea-autosize.title: Disabled auto-sizing on a fixed message box

toolbar.title: Vibrant rounded media controls toolbar
toolbar.code:
<m3e-toolbar variant="vibrant" shape="rounded">
  <m3e-button variant="text">
    <m3e-icon slot="icon" name="skip_previous"></m3e-icon>
  </m3e-button>
  <m3e-button variant="filled">
    <m3e-icon slot="icon" name="play_arrow"></m3e-icon>
  </m3e-button>
  <m3e-button variant="text">
    <m3e-icon slot="icon" name="skip_next"></m3e-icon>
  </m3e-button>
</m3e-toolbar>

toolbar.title: Elevated vertical editing toolbar
toolbar.code:
<m3e-toolbar vertical elevated shape="square">
  <m3e-button variant="text">
    <m3e-icon slot="icon" name="format_bold"></m3e-icon>
  </m3e-button>
  <m3e-button variant="text">
    <m3e-icon slot="icon" name="format_italic"></m3e-icon>
  </m3e-button>
  <m3e-button variant="text">
    <m3e-icon slot="icon" name="format_underlined"></m3e-icon>
  </m3e-button>
</m3e-toolbar>

tooltip.title: Simple tooltip on an icon button
tooltip.code:
<m3e-button id="refreshBtn" variant="tonal">
  <m3e-icon slot="icon" name="refresh"></m3e-icon>
</m3e-button>
<m3e-tooltip for="refreshBtn" position="above">Refresh data</m3e-tooltip>

tooltip.title: Rich tooltip with subhead and actions
tooltip.code:
Details New settings available Now you can adjust uploaded image quality and upgrade your available storage space.
Learn more

tooltip.title: Tooltip with touch gestures disabled
tooltip.code:
<m3e-button id="deleteBtn" variant="text">
  <m3e-icon slot="icon" name="delete"></m3e-icon>
</m3e-button>
<m3e-tooltip for="deleteBtn" position="after" touch-gestures="off" hide-delay="400">Delete item</m3e-tooltip>

tree.title: Documentation navigation tree
tree.code: Getting Started Overview Installation Components Button Card

tree.title: Multi-select tree with cascading checkboxes
tree.code: Fruits Apples Oranges Bananas Vegetables Carrots Broccoli

bottom-sheet.title: Modal share sheet with action list
bottom-sheet.code: Share Share to Copy link Email

bottom-sheet.title: Non-modal filter sheet opening to a detent
bottom-sheet.code: Filters Filters Apply
